display.purpose: Hero tagline and page h1 — Source Serif 4, accent words in <b>.

headline.purpose: Section titles; optional mono index prefix only on real sequences.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, POS marks, title block, badges. Uppercase lives here only.

shadows.name: sheet-rest
shadows.purpose: 1px tonal seam under a sheet at rest — most cards override to none.

shadows.name: sheet-raised
shadows.purpose: BOM / KPI panel only. A seam, not a float.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state and bar transitions.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: One calm scroll-in fade + 16px rise; reduced-motion shows content instantly.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: Solid machine-accent CTA — the one place the orange becomes a field.
components.html: Anfrage schreiben
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; background: var(--accent, #cb5328); color: var(--accent-ink, #fff); font-family: var(--sans, 'Inter', sans-serif); font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; border-radius: var(--radius, 3px); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: var(--accent-hover, #b1481f); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Hairline-bordered secondary action; border and text shift to accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 18px; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #c3bba9); color: var(--text, #211c16); background: transparent; font-family: var(--sans, 'Inter', sans-serif); font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border-radius: var(--radius, 3px); text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--accent, #cb5328); color: var(--accent, #cb5328); }

components.name: Part-Number Chip
components.description: Squared mono tag for tech-stack labels — never a pill, never accent-filled.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: var(--mono, 'SF Mono', monospace); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.2px; color: var(--text-muted, #6b6357); background: var(--surface, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--border, #ddd5c6); border-radius: 2px; padding: 4px 9px; }

components.name: Sheet Card (link)
components.description: Flat hairline sheet; a 3px accent edge scales in on hover/focus as the interaction affordance.
components.html:
ERP-Web-App

Liest ein gewachsenes ERP aus und macht Maschinendaten per API bearbeitbar.

Mehr ansehen →
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; background: var(--surface, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--border, #ddd5c6); border-radius: var(--radius, 3px); padding: 22px; color: var(--text, #211c16); text-decoration: none; } .ds-card::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 3px; background: var(--accent, #cb5328); transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: top; transition: transform 0.25s ease; } .ds-card:hover::before, .ds-card:focus-visible::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: var(--serif, 'Source Serif 4', serif); font-weight: 600; font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0; } .ds-card p { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--text-muted, #6b6357); margin: 0; } .ds-card-mehr { font-family: var(--mono, monospace); font-size: 13px; color: var(--accent, #cb5328); }

components.name: Active Nav Link
components.description: Active topnav link marked by an accent under-tick — no fill, no radius.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav a { padding: 7px 14px; font-family: var(--sans, 'Inter', sans-serif); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted, #6b6357); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: var(--text, #211c16); } .ds-nav a.is-active { color: var(--text, #211c16); box-shadow: inset 0 -2px 0 var(--accent, #cb5328); }

components.name: Dimension Line
components.description: Signature: 1px accent rule with CSS arrowheads and a centered mono measurement label, set under the hero headline.
components.css: .ds-dimline { position: relative; height: 1px; background: var(--accent, #cb5328); margin: 20px 0 2px; } .ds-dimline::before, .ds-dimline::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: -3px; width: 0; height: 0; border-top: 3.5px solid transparent; border-bottom: 3.5px solid transparent; } .ds-dimline::before { left: 0; border-right: 8px solid var(--accent, #cb5328); } .ds-dimline::after { right: 0; border-left: 8px solid var(--accent, #cb5328); } .ds-dimline-label { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: -9px; transform: translateX(-50%); background: var(--bg, #f4f1ea); padding: 0 8px; font-family: var(--mono, monospace); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted, #6b6357); white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: BOM Break Row
components.description: Signature: a parts-list row marking the Medienbruch — the one place the accent names a problem.
components.html:
Stückliste — Datenfluss
POS.01ERP-Export
POS.03MedienbruchBruch
POS.05Fertigung
components.css: .ds-bom { background: var(--surface, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--border, #ddd5c6); border-radius: 2px; } .ds-bom-head { font-family: var(--mono, monospace); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted, #6b6357); padding: 9px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #ddd5c6); } .ds-bom-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #ddd5c6); } .ds-bom-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-bom-pos { font-family: var(--mono, monospace); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted, #6b6357); width: 48px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-bom-name { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text, #211c16); flex: 1; } .ds-bom-break { background: var(--accent-soft, rgba(203,83,40,.08)); outline: 1px solid var(--accent, #cb5328); outline-offset: -1px; } .ds-bom-break .ds-bom-pos, .ds-bom-break .ds-bom-name { color: var(--accent, #cb5328); } .ds-bom-badge { font-family: var(--mono, monospace); font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent-ink, #fff); background: var(--accent, #cb5328); padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Every surface behaves like a sheet of engineering drawing paper on a workshop desk: a faint engineering grid behind the page, content inside a hairline frame with corner registration marks, a headline underscored by a real dimension line, a mono title block anchoring the hero. Warmth is Siegerland-editorial (serif headline voice, warm ink on warm paper); discipline is the machine shop (precise, measured, nothing decorative that isn't functional). The system rejects the cool GitHub-dark palette it came from, the cream/sand AI-default, fake-KPI dashboards, gradient text, glass cards, and drop-shadow depth. Depth comes from line weight, identity from one accent, trust from real labelled own-builds.
keyCharacteristics: Warm drawing-paper background (#f4f1ea) under a 20px/100px engineering grid, never a flat fill.
Exactly one machine accent (#cb5328) — CTA, active-nav tick, dimension arrows, Bruch marker.
Three voices: Source Serif 4 (display), Inter (body), mono (technical stamps).
Flat by default — hairline borders carry structure; shadows are near-zero seams.
Squared corners (2-3px), not rounded pills. A card is a sheet, not a bubble.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one accent, #cb5328. Never a large fill field — only line, edge, arrowhead, tick, or ≤8%-alpha wash. Its rarity is what makes a CTA read as 'press here.'

rules.name: The Warmth-Is-Earned Rule
rules.body: Warmth lives in the accent and the serif type, never the background. #f4f1ea is the ceiling; cream/sand/parchment near-whites are forbidden.

rules.name: The Migration-Debt Rule
rules.body: system.html demo internals are still hardcoded GitHub-indigo (#818cf8, rgba(99,102,241,...), #161b22). Legacy, not part of this palette — new work uses the warm tokens.

rules.name: The Stamp-Case Rule
rules.body: Uppercase appears only in the mono technical layer (eyebrows, POS marks, title block, badges). Prose and headlines are always sentence case.

rules.name: The Legacy-Sans Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk still styles a few un-migrated sub-headings (.card h3, .sys-card h3, .kpi-val). Source Serif 4 is canonical; the holdouts are migration debt, not a second display face.

rules.name: The No-Float Rule
rules.body: No blurred drop-shadows, ever. A raised surface gets a #ffffff sheet fill on the paper bg plus a hairline border. The failure tell: a card that looks like it's hovering.

rules.name: The Edge-On-Intent Rule
rules.body: Cards are inert at rest. Interaction is signalled by a 3px accent edge that scales in on hover/focus, not by lifting or shadowing the whole card.

dos: Do keep the engineering grid behind every page (20px / 100px); the paper is never a flat fill.
Do reserve #cb5328 for line, edge, tick, arrowhead, badge, and ≤8%-alpha wash. One accent, sparingly.
Do convey depth with hairline borders and tonal layering (paper → sunken → sheet), never blurred shadows.
Do set headlines in Source Serif 4, sentence case, with text-wrap: balance; cap prose at 62-70ch.
Do keep uppercase to the mono technical stamps (eyebrows, POS marks, title block, badges).
Do show only real, 'Eigenbau'-labelled own-builds; verify body contrast ≥7:1 (AAA target), AA as the floor.
Do migrate any new system.html work onto the warm tokens.
donts: Don't reintroduce the cool GitHub-dark palette or any cream/sand/parchment warm-neutral background.
Don't build glowing fake-KPI dashboards or any 'Werkbank-OS' hero that implies a running client system. No manufactured proof.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as decoration, or the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient).
Don't use blurred drop-shadows or pill radii on primary actions; corners are 2-3px and surfaces are flat.
Don't add an uppercase tracked eyebrow or 01/02/03 numbered marker over every section; numbers earn their place only in a real ordered sequence.
Don't use border-left/right > 1px as a decorative colored stripe (the .proj-disclaimer 3px edge is a known exception to retire).
Don't let a single accent be the sole carrier of state — demo status must also read via label/text (colour-blind safe).
